_metadata.scope_note: Shared namespace. Inline field validation messages used across onboarding forms and dashboard modals. Do not duplicate into feature namespaces.

display_name_too_short: El nombre visible debe tener al menos {min_length} caracteres.
display_name_too_long: El nombre visible no puede superar los {max_length} caracteres.
project_name_empty: El nombre del proyecto no puede estar vacío.
bpm_out_of_range: El tempo debe estar entre {min} y {max} BPM.

_notes.display_name_too_short: [PLACEHOLDER] {min_length} is an integer. 'nombre visible' matches profile_setup.field_display_name_label for consistency.
_notes.display_name_too_long: [PLACEHOLDER] {max_length} is an integer. 'superar los' is more natural than 'exceder' in Spain's everyday register.
_notes.bpm_out_of_range: [PLACEHOLDER] {min} and {max} are integers. BPM is a universal music abbreviation — kept as-is per CLAUDE.md rules and ontology.
